name: Bioline Beef Sausage 15g X 30pcs
description: BIOLINE BEEF SAUSAGE: The product contains unsaturated fatty acids and trace elements, rich in high-quality protein, very tasty and can be used as a reward in training. Ingredients: Beef (60%), Water, Corn Starch, Soya Protein, Sucrose Additive Composition: Caragel, Sodium Chloride Suitable for All Dogs
